summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of HomePujan services.html (Vedic Library page). New standalone page tested for the first time. All 40+ test cases passing. 100% pass rate across all critical flows: page load, filter system, card content, modal system, WA URL generation, footer, floating elements, mobile layout, and landing.html nav dropdown.

issues: Filter pills use flex-wrap:wrap (pills wrap to 2 lines: ALL/HOME/BUSINESS/PERSONAL on line 1, MILESTONES on line 2) instead of horizontal scroll with overflow-x:auto. Requirement mentions 'filter pills scroll horizontally'. Functionally fine — all pills accessible — but doesn't match the horizontal-scroll spec.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add `overflow-x: auto; flex-wrap: nowrap;` to `.filter-pills` inside the `@media (max-width: 767px)` block so filter pills scroll horizontally on mobile instead of wrapping to a 2nd line. Current wrap behavior is functional but doesn't match spec.
critical_code_review_comments: Filter pills on mobile wrap instead of scrolling horizontally — minor spec deviation, functionally not broken
filtered-out cards still occupy grid space (opacity:0.12, scale:0.97) — intentional design choice but grid may look uneven if filter returns an odd number of cards
openConsultModal() prefill uses substring(0,10) lowercase match which could fail on non-ASCII Sanskrit characters at boundary — currently works but fragile for future services
context_for_next_testing_agent: services.html is a new static standalone page at /app/frontend/public/services.html. All features fully working: parchment background (#FDFBF7), glassmorphism navbar with 'VEDIC LIBRARY' active-page highlighted, hero with Cinzel font, sticky filter bar at top:72px, 5 filter pills (All/Home/Business/Personal/Milestones), 16 service cards with correct Sanskrit names/Dakshina/badges, consultation modal with pre-fill, WhatsApp URL with 'Pranam' + 'Vedic Alignment Call' message, deep maroon footer (#4A0E0E) with gold border and grain texture, floating WA button (wa.me/919667039964), gold lotus scroll-to-top button (appears >350px scroll). Landing.html nav dropdown 'THE VEDIC LIBRARY — ALL 16' links correctly to services.html. Mobile single-column grid works; only minor issue: filter pills wrap instead of horizontal scroll. Previous passing tests: iteration_3.json (landing.html 100% pass).
